sentences.S1: Does a browser-only meta-analysis workbench reproduce the published fixed-effects pooled hazard ratio for SGLT2 inhibitors on the primary composite endpoint in HFpEF?
sentences.S2: Two trials, n=12,251: EMPEROR-Preserved (empagliflozin, 5988) and DELIVER (dapagliflozin, 6263), primary composite hazard ratios taken from published NEJM tables.
sentences.S3: Generic inverse-variance pooling on the log-hazard-ratio scale using REML random-effects, with fixed-effect, Paule-Mandel, and HKSJ-with-floor as sensitivity estimators.
sentences.S4: REML pool: HR 0.81 (95% CI 0.74-0.88), |Δ|=0.007 exceeds prespecified tolerance 0.005 versus Vaduganathan 2022 Lancet pool HR 0.80 (0.73-0.87); τ²=0.00, I²=0%, Q-p=0.68.
sentences.S5: Across estimators the pooled HR is 0.81 (range 0.00 between FE and PM at τ²=0); DerSimonian-Laird is not reported because it is inappropriate at k<10.
sentences.S6: Divergence exceeds the tight aggregate-branch tolerance, attributable to two-decimal-place rounding of trial-reported HRs against a pool retaining more precision internally.
sentences.S7: The pool uses two-decimal-place HRs; prediction intervals, funnel plots, and trim-and-fill are undefined at k=2; prespecified FAIL boundary.
